scripts.dev:restart: npm run dev:stop && sleep 1 && npm run dev:local
scripts.stack:local: npm run db:up && sleep 5 && npm run setup:postgres && npm run dev:local:postgres
scripts.setup:dev: npm install && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.setup:sqlite: node scripts/prisma-generate-for-env.mjs --sqlite && cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db push --schema prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma
scripts.setup:sqlite:force: node scripts/prisma-generate-for-env.mjs --sqlite && cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db push --schema prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma --accept-data-loss
scripts.seed:test-user:sqlite: node scripts/prisma-generate-for-env.mjs --sqlite && cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db node ./node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs scripts/seed-test-user.ts
scripts.bootstrap:sqlite: npm run setup:sqlite:force && npm run seed:test-user:sqlite
scripts.setup:postgres: node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev:local:postgres: node scripts/ensure-local-postgres.mjs && node scripts/prisma-generate-for-env.mjs --postgres && cross-env NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3002 PORT=3002 node ./node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs server/index.ts
scripts.dev:status: lsof -i :3002 && echo '✅ Dev running' || echo '❌ Dev not running'
scripts.build: next build && npx tsc server/index.ts --outDir dist --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --module commonjs --target ES2020
